name: WeatherStar 4000+
description: The classic 90s Weather Channel WeatherStar 4000 local forecast, reimagined for the web. Current conditions, local & extended forecast, radar, regional maps and almanac — auto-cycling in kiosk mode. Pulls live US data from api.weather.gov, no API key.
author: Matt Walsh (netbymatt), packaged for Portal by compscirunner
note: dwellSec 0 = the host carousel should NOT auto-advance; WeatherStar self-cycles through its own displays. Change latLon/latLonQuery to your US location.
